title: peltastes peltatus
side_effects: Peltastes peltatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. In severe cases, it can cause anaphylaxis, respiratory failure, and even death. Some users may also experience stomach upset, diarrhea, and vomiting, as well as headaches and fatigue. If not handled correctly, Peltastes peltatus can also interact with other medications, leading to adverse reactions and complications.
